verbatim_text: So earlier we saw that the language model learns to construct and update these kind of models internally using this sort of associative algorithm. So specifically in this case, it's given a sequence of conversation turns, and then it needs to compute its current belief about the user in some hidden representation, which it then uses to predict the next question to ask the user. So we know from the gate results we saw earlier that this is useful in some domains, but not others. And we suspect at least part of the failures arises from its difficulty in doing this internal simulation.
